title: gentiana amarella var. plebeia
intro: Gentiana amarella var. plebeia, also known as the "Quaking Grass Gentian", is a variety of the Gentian plant, specifically a type of flowering plant belonging to the gentian family (Gentianaceae). The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Gentiana amarella var. plebeia include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and ease respiratory problems, such as coughs and bronchitis. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
